activities_projects.title: Identifying Global Products Around Us
activities_projects.objective: To recognize foreign brands and understand global trade.
steps: List 10 products used at home.
Identify which products are made in India and which are imported.
Discuss how globalisation makes these products available.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how globalisation connects countries through trade.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check correct identification and participation in discussion.

activities_projects.title: Global Brands Poster
activities_projects.objective: To identify multinational companies operating in India.
steps: List at least five multinational companies in India.
Draw logos or write their names on a poster.
Mention one product of each company.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students recognize the role of MNCs in the Indian economy.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess accuracy of examples and presentation.

activities_projects.title: Before and After Globalisation Table
activities_projects.objective: To compare economic conditions before and after globalisation.
steps: Create two columns: Before 1991 and After 1991.
List changes in trade, products, and employment.
Discuss differences in class.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand economic reforms and their impact.

activities_projects.title: Role Play on Global Trade
activities_projects.objective: To understand how trade connects countries.
steps: Assign roles such as exporter, importer, consumer.
Act out a simple trade transaction.
Discuss benefits of trade.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand basic process of international trade.
activities_projects.evaluation: Evaluate clarity of explanation and participation.

activities_projects.title: WTO Fact Sheet
activities_projects.objective: To learn about the role of WTO.
steps: Write three functions of WTO.
Explain its importance in global trade.
Share findings with classmates.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the purpose of WTO.

activities_projects.title: Foreign Investment List
activities_projects.objective: To identify sectors receiving foreign investment in India.
steps: List sectors like telecom, automobile, IT.
Explain how foreign investment helps growth.
Give one example for each sector.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand impact of foreign investment.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess clarity and correctness of examples.

activities_projects.title: Consumer Choice Activity
activities_projects.objective: To understand increased consumer choices due to globalisation.
steps: List three products with multiple brand options.
Identify which are Indian and which are foreign brands.
Discuss how this benefits consumers.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand benefits of global competition.

activities_projects.title: Globalisation Mind Map
activities_projects.objective: To summarize key concepts of globalisation.
steps: Write 'Globalisation' at the center.
Add branches like trade, MNCs, technology, WTO.
Add one example for each branch.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students organize and connect concepts visually.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess completeness and clarity of mind map.

activities_projects.title: Export and Import Activity
activities_projects.objective: To differentiate between exports and imports.
steps: List five goods India exports.
List five goods India imports.
Write one reason for each.

activities_projects.title: Small Business and Globalisation Discussion
activities_projects.objective: To understand impact of globalisation on small businesses.
steps: Identify one local small business.
Discuss how foreign competition affects it.
Suggest one way to improve competitiveness.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand challenges faced by small producers.
